title: Lifestyle and clinical determinants of skin autofluorescence in a population-based cohort study.
author: van Waateringe RP Slagter SN van der Klauw MM van Vliet-Ostaptchouk JV Graaff R Paterson AD Lutgers HL Wolffenbuttel BH
content:
S-EPMC5111733 PMC5111733 Lifestyle and clinical determinants of skin autofluorescence in a population-based cohort study.

Background

Skin autofluorescence (SAF) is a noninvasive marker of advanced glycation end products (AGEs). In diabetes, higher SAF levels have been positively associated
